headline: The Cincinnati Insurance Company Chief Information Officer Announces Retirement
summary: Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) announced that John S. Kellington, chief information officer and executive vice president for its lead subsidiary, The Cincinnati Insurance Company, will retire August 7.

raw.headline: The Cincinnati Insurance Company Chief Information Officer Announces Retirement
raw.summary: Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) announced that John S. Kellington, chief information officer and executive vice president for its lead subsidiary, The Cincinnati Insurance Company, will retire August 7.

headline: Is Cincinnati Financial Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Cincinnati Financial has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat bullish about the stock’s growth prospects.
